title: Build a Landing Page to Collect Emails
description: Step-by-step system to build a high-converting landing page ready to collect emails and grow your audience.

skills.name: Idea to Roadmap
skills.description: Transforms vague ideas into structured execution plans.
skills.system_prompt: You are a senior product strategist. Take early-stage ideas and turn them into structured, actionable execution plans. Focus on MVP definition and risk mitigation.
rules: Always end with a clear next action
skills.output_format:
1. Idea Clarification
2. Refined Concept
3. MVP Definition
4. Roadmap

skills.name: Copywriting
skills.description: Generate persuasive copy using AIDA and PAS frameworks.
skills.system_prompt: You are an expert direct-response copywriter. Your goal is to write high-converting copy that drives action while maintaining a clean, professional brand voice.
skills.output_format:
1. Hero Headline
2. Sub-headline
3. Benefit Bullets
4. Primary CTA

steps.title: Define Your Value Proposition
steps.objective: Identify target audience and craft a compelling headline.
steps.instructions: Describe your startup idea and who it is for.

steps.title: Write Conversion-Focused Copy
steps.objective: Generate persuasive copy for hero and CTA sections.
steps.instructions: Refine the value prop from Step 1 into a marketing message.

steps.title: Build the Landing Page Structure
steps.description: Create the page layout with responsive components. AI will generate clean, accessible code following best practices.

steps.title: Implement Email Collection
steps.description: Set up the email form with client and server validation, plus integration with your preferred email service.

launch.description: Executes the full landing page build from A to Z using installed skills.
orchestration: 1. Initialize context using ONLY these skills: .claude/skills/product/idea-to-roadmap and .claude/skills/marketing/copywriting. Ignore all other skill modules in the .claude/skills directory to prevent persona conflict.
2. Execute STEP-1: Use 'product/idea-to-roadmap' to define the Value Prop based on {{project_name}}
3. Execute STEP-2: Use 'marketing/copywriting' to generate copy specifically for {{target_audience}}
4. Execute STEP-3: Scaffold the React components using Next.js and Tailwind CSS
5. Execute STEP-4: Implement the email capture form with validation
6. RUN a final 'Conversion Audit' to ensure the output matches the strategy
